series_metadata.series_title: Annual Application for Distribution Center Qualifying Certificate
series_metadata.series_description: Record series includes forms used to apply for a qualified distribution center certificate.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years, then destroy. If scanned, retain 6 mos. after scanned and imaged, then shred. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
